articles.title: Judge says Kennedy Center board broke law putting Trump’s name on building, blocks closure
articles.description:
Trump said in response that he’s backing away from his proposed renovation and returning control of the arts institution to Congress.

summary: Judge ruled Kennedy Center board illegally added Trump's name to the building.

Control of the Kennedy Center will revert to Congress, affecting local arts funding.
